{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321133802A43624323A9AD3FFA6C2"}"},"total":889},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7535690714179535678","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"就喜欢这种文，没有一个是哑巴，哑巴也得给你俩巴掌让你醒过来，对小四超级友好，对德妃佟皇贵妃不咋地，已经完结，人气超高，大家快来看","text_exts":[{"e":45,"s":42,"text":"皇贵妃","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%9A%87%E8%B4%B5%E5%A6%83&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774071483D3FFA6C2%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227535690714179535678%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227266369031492340791%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%9A%87%E8%B4%B5%E5%A6%83%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754545130,"group_id":"7266369031492340791","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我热爱第五人格的一切，包括他们每个人的性格","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4mEyFTLdUfmYRUFbOy9X039OJg+B/egoKp1+kfjzERl","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/29b202ea1581448a816d8e38d4ae6c5d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618941&x-signature=mhOiqNF6j536KumEpjxWwg3w%2FVU%3D","user_id":"1698123906028175","user_name":"请不要过半秒救"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1698123906028175","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1748191010,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7266369031492340791","book_info":{"abstract":"【架空清朝，主亲情，爱情线几乎没有。】
1.太子胤礽
胤礽死后的魂魄在紫禁城飘了五十年，亲眼看见四弟劳累而死，弘历骄奢淫逸，痛心不已。
再次回到当初，他会怎么做呢?
清太子胤礽，康熙与元后赫舍里氏唯一存活下来的孩子，自幼被康熙亲自抚养，宠爱非常。胤礽精通诗书，善弓马骑射，这里会给胤礽一个不一样的人生。
2.永琮
生母是孝贤皇后，乾隆的白月光，大姐是固伦和敬公主，如果永琮没有在两岁那年身亡，又会发生什么故事呢？
3.弘昼
康熙、雍正、乾隆三位帝王的掌心宝。
4.福全
顺治长子，扶持幼弟登基，跟康熙一起平三藩，灭鳌拜，乃是康熙最敬重的兄长。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o6ccf26f4c7cb85d8ad409b6d789414fe~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"芒果不加酱","author_id":"","book_id":"7266369031492340791","book_name":"清穿之模范皇子","book_short_name":"大清模范皇子","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8659人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1139,"name":"古风世情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1139&name=古风世情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":76,"name":"清穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=76&name=清穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1317,"name":"古言权谋","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1317&name=古言权谋&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7266370039962403388","read_count":"8659","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1000272"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"475","tags":"古风世情,古言权谋,古代言情,穿越,清穿,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/cb9de8128b3680e078855cf51034c5ed~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779255483&x-signature=1P9o%2FHGtnl3n5Mg3LAcGlo8wgSw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2089495818143191","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"47"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321133802A43624323A9AD3FFA6C2"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},
